texto: A high-powered, successful woman doesn't necessarily have the same support behind her that a man in that position would. Plus, she's expected to be a domestic goddess, as well as the best wife, mother, friend, and lover. But it's not just in politics: you see it in acting, too, and in journalism.
explicacao: Citação de Raquel Cassidy sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “A high-powered, successful woman doesn't necessarily have the same support behind her that a man …” articula amizade, mother, politics em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e politics.
